title: Mauritiella pumila
taxonomy: Mauritiella pumila is classified as a species of palm tree in the family Arecaceae. It is a member of the genus Mauritiella, which is closely related to the genus Mauritia. The genus Mauritiella is a part of the tribe Attaleeae, within the subfamily Arecoideae. The family Arecaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as palms, which is further divided into several subfamilies. Mauritiella pumila is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
uses: Mauritiella pumila is a plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and it has been found to possess various medicinal properties.
